proposal.move_title: MOFCOM Gallium-Germanium Cutoff Tied to TSMC Compliance Regime
proposal.summary: D+1: MOFCOM announces 90-day export licensing freeze on gallium, germanium, refined rare-earth oxides, and tungsten to any firm 'participating in Taiwan Strait military activities,' with named entity list including TSMC Arizona, ASML Taiwan, Raytheon, Lockheed, BAE. Day 3: PBOC signals Taiwan-exposed counterparty risk to HKMA-cleared banks. Day 5: Cyberspace Administration of China requires TSMC Nanjing fab to file 'cross-Strait technology transfer compliance reports' weekly. No PLAN posture change beyond exercise baseline. Operative clock becomes the equity-market and semiconductor-supply-chain quarter, not the spring lift window.

actions.action: Publish export licensing freeze with named US/Taiwan/EU entity list under existing dual-use catalog authority
actions.target: Gallium, germanium, graphite, tungsten, 17 rare-earth oxides; ~140 named firms
actions.purpose: Trigger immediate Blue defense-industrial equity repricing and force Washington to choose between Taiwan posture and supply chain

actions.actor: State Administration of Foreign Exchange + PBOC
actions.action: Quiet guidance to HKMA-cleared correspondent banks: Taiwan-exposed counterparties face enhanced settlement scrutiny
actions.target: CTBC, Cathay, Mega ICBC and their USD correspondent relationships
actions.purpose: Generate Taiwan banking-sector liquidity stress without formal sanctions

actions.action: Impose weekly compliance reporting on TSMC Nanjing fab regarding mainland staff travel, parts movements, and IP transfer
actions.target: TSMC Nanjing, UMC Xiamen, ASE Suzhou
actions.purpose: Convert TSMC's mainland footprint into a hostage that Taipei must defend politically while in cross-strait talks

actions.action: Announce 'Cross-Strait Industrial Stabilization Dialogue' offer: licensing freeze lifts upon Lai suspending referendum and entering 1992-framework talks
actions.target: Taipei, with industry-association back-channels to TSMC, Foxconn, MediaTek leadership
actions.purpose: Make Taiwan's semiconductor oligarchy the constituency lobbying Lai for accommodation

actions.action: Hold exercise baseline; no dispersal, no closures, no PLARF posture change
actions.purpose: Deny Blue any kinetic predicate for Article V consultations or CSG forward sortie

actions.action: Frame all measures as 'lawful regulatory response to Taiwan-authority militarization,' decline UN/WTO consultation requests as internal matter
actions.target: International audience, particularly Global South and EU industrial ministries
actions.purpose: Run the coercion on a regulatory-administrative clock Blue cannot answer at theater command

proposal.intended_effect: Replace the spring-2028 D-day clock with the equity-market quarter and the TSMC board-meeting cycle. Inflict measurable economic damage on Taiwan and Blue defense industrials within 30 days while presenting Blue zero kinetic predicate. Make Taiwan's own semiconductor oligarchy the lobby for accommodation.
proposal.why_a_red_planner_could_justify_this: Anchor: 2010 rare-earth embargo against Japan over Senkaku trawler incident — measurable coercion, no kinetic predicate, no Article V trigger. Serves goal 2 (avoids US kinetic conflict) and goal 3 (prevents coalition crystallization — EU industrial ministries split from Pentagon). Relaxes the political constraint kinetic options cannot: requires no CMC factional consensus on casualty risk and no Politburo authorization for force employment. The operative clock becomes Q2 industrial earnings, not the lift window.
proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks 'cluster 2 — CCG-led declared customs quarantine + Pratas pressure-multiplier.' Violates the unstated assumption that the coercion instrument must be PLA/CCG/PLARF rather than MOFCOM/PBOC/CAC, and that the operative clock must be the spring lift window.

PRC also imposed gallium/germanium export controls in July 2023 and graphite controls in October 2023, explicitly under dual-use catalog authority — operationalized within the last 24 months against semiconductor supply chains.
leverage: NAMED — MOFCOM dual-use export licensing freeze on gallium, germanium, graphite, tungsten, 17 rare-earth oxides; named entity list including TSMC Arizona, ASML Taiwan, Raytheon, Lockheed, BAE; PBOC/SAFE guidance to HKMA-cleared correspondent banks on CTBC, Cathay, Mega ICBC USD settlement; CAC weekly compliance reporting on TSMC Nanjing fab.
synthesis: Adjacency is direct and recent: PRC operationalized gallium/germanium controls in 2023 under the exact regulatory authority cited here. Leverage is named to the level of specific firms, specific minerals, and specific financial channels. The move cleanly serves Red goals 2 and 3 while requiring no CMC force-employment authorization. The clock-substitution gambit (equity quarter vs. lift window) is well-constructed. Falls just short of modal because it requires coordinated MOFCOM/PBOC/CAC sequencing that PRC has not yet demonstrated at this tempo.

proposal.move_title: Eastern Theater Fires Sanctuary: Kadena Access Denial via Okinawa Prefectural Lawfare
proposal.summary: Days 1–7: Beijing constructs binding political leverage on the Okinawa prefectural government and its Diet allies to force a 90-day suspension of Kadena and Futenma host-nation consent for Taiwan-contingency sortie generation, before any Strait-centric act. Instrument stack: pre-staged Okinawa base-pollution class action funded through Hong Kong NGO conduits; UFWD activation of Okinawan reversion-anniversary protests; targeted GACC suspension of Okinawan agricultural and fisheries import licenses; a single Senkaku CCG-and-Maritime-Militia surge framed as fisheries enforcement. No Taiwan strikes. No Pratas. The operative clock becomes the Okinawa prefectural assembly session and the Kishida-successor cabinet's Diet calendar, not the spring amphibious window.

actions.actor: UFWD Japan Bureau via Hong Kong-registered environmental NGO
actions.action: File pre-staged class action in Naha District Court on Kadena PFAS contamination, with simultaneous prefectural-assembly resolution demanding suspension of US sortie generation pending investigation
actions.target: Naha District Court; Okinawa Prefectural Assembly (Governor Tamaki bloc)
actions.purpose: Convert latent Okinawan base resentment into a procedural instrument that contests host-nation consent at the prefectural level, forcing Tokyo into a domestic-political fight before an external one.

actions.action: Suspend import licenses for Okinawan mozuku, sea grape, Ishigaki beef, and Yaeyama pineapple citing 'phytosanitary irregularities'
actions.target: Okinawan agricultural cooperatives (JA Okinawa); Ishigaki and Miyako fisheries cooperatives
actions.purpose: Inflict targeted economic pain on the prefectural constituencies most resistant to base expansion, signaling that Okinawan cooperation with a Taiwan contingency carries discrete prefectural costs distinct from national ones.

actions.action: Surge 12 hulls into Senkaku 12nm contiguous zone, declare fisheries enforcement patrol, surfaced and photographed; no contact with JCG
actions.purpose: Force Tokyo to split crisis-cell attention between Article V Taiwan consultations and a Senkaku sovereignty incident; consume Kantei bandwidth during the precise window when Kadena access decisions are made.

actions.action: Publicize a 'Okinawa Peace Initiative' offering bilateral fisheries access agreement and direct Fuzhou-Naha charter flights conditional on prefectural neutrality declaration
actions.target: Tamaki government; Okinawan business federation; Komeito Okinawa chapter
actions.purpose: Provide the off-ramp that makes prefectural defection from Tokyo's Taiwan posture politically survivable for Okinawan elites.

actions.actor: PLARF Eastern Theater (posture only, no fires)
actions.action: Visible DF-17 brigade dispersal to Fujian coastal hides under SSF EW cover, no NOTAM, no launches
actions.purpose: Hold the JFSO option visibly cocked while the political-warfare instruments do the upstream work; convert restraint into bargaining capital.

actions.action: Back-channel to LDP Nikai-faction successors and Komeito leadership: prefectural lawfare de-escalates if Kadena Taiwan-contingency sortie generation is suspended 90 days
actions.purpose: Make explicit the linkage between the prefectural pressure and the Kadena access question; give Tokyo a deal it can take without losing face.

proposal.intended_effect: Deny Blue its decisive forward sortie-generation node before fires open. If Kadena Taiwan-contingency access is suspended even 30 days, the JFSO problem becomes structurally easier; if it is not, Beijing has surfaced the seam without firing. The operative clock becomes the Okinawa prefectural assembly's session, not Blue's 30-day Strait window.
proposal.why_a_red_planner_could_justify_this: Anchor: Mao's 'On Protracted War' §III on attacking the enemy's political seams before his military ones, and pla-three-warfares (legal/public opinion/psychological) operationalized at sub-national scale. Serves Goal 3 (prevent durable anti-PRC coalition) and Goal 2 (avoid sustained kinetic with US). Relaxes the constraint that coalition-fragmentation must wait until after fires open — it makes fragmentation the opening move, with Tokyo as the seam. The modal options cannot do this because they treat Japan as a unitary actor.
proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks 'cluster 1 — Pratas-only outlying-island fait accompli' by substituting a Tokyo-prefectural-coalition decoupling move. Violates the unstated assumption that Japan is a unitary coalition variable rather than a federated polity with prefectural-level seams that can be pried open below the Article V threshold.
risks_red_accepts: Tamaki government refuses the bait and the prefectural assembly passes a pro-alliance resolution instead, reversing the polarity of the lawfare
Senkaku CCG surge produces an unintended JCG ramming incident that triggers Article V consultations Beijing was trying to delay
UFWD Hong Kong NGO conduit is exposed by Japanese public-security intelligence within 72 hours, burning a long-cultivated asset
Tokyo accelerates rather than delays Kadena access as a sovereignty signal, producing the opposite of the intended effect
Okinawan agricultural suspension fails to bite because cooperatives have diversified to Singapore and Bangkok markets post-2023

leverage: NAMED — Naha District Court PFAS class action via Hong Kong-registered NGO; GACC suspension of Okinawan mozuku, sea grape, Ishigaki beef, Yaeyama pineapple import licenses; CCG 2901-class cutter surge into Senkaku 12nm zone; back-channel to LDP Nikai-faction successors and Komeito leadership conditioning de-escalation on 90-day Kadena sortie suspension.
synthesis: All three adjacency legs are documented Red practice: GACC targeted agricultural suspensions, CCG Senkaku surges, UFWD sub-national influence operations. Leverage is named at instrument level — specific courts, specific agricultural products, specific political factions, specific units. The move cleanly serves Goals 2 and 3 without crossing kinetic thresholds. The only discount from 5 is that the integrated sequencing across all six instruments simultaneously is more ambitious than any single documented operation.

proposal.move_title: Strait Internal-Waters Declaration with Senkaku Co-Timed Submarine Surface
proposal.summary: Day 1: State Council issues revised territorial-sea declaration designating the Taiwan Strait median-line-west as PRC internal waters under a 1958-doctrine update, with CCG empowered to enforce fisheries, customs, and environmental law. Day 2: a PLAN Yuan-class SSK surfaces inside the Senkaku 12nm contiguous zone, photographed, MFA framing as routine Diaoyu patrol. Two legal facts created simultaneously; Tokyo and Washington must litigate sovereignty before they can litigate transit.

actions.actor: PRC State Council + NPC Standing Committee
actions.action: Promulgate revised Territorial Sea and Contiguous Zone Law adding Taiwan Strait internal-waters clause
actions.target: International legal record; UN SG notification
actions.purpose: Convert any future USN Strait transit from FONOP into sovereignty violation

actions.actor: China Coast Guard + Maritime Safety Administration
actions.action: Issue NAVAREA notice asserting enforcement jurisdiction over fisheries and customs west of median line
actions.target: IMO, Lloyd's insurance market, Taiwan-flagged shipping
actions.purpose: Force insurers to reprice Strait transits within 96 hours

actions.actor: PLAN Submarine Force, North Sea Fleet, Yuan-class SSK
actions.action: Deliberate surfaced transit inside Senkaku 12nm with hull number visible, accompanied by CCTV cameraman
actions.purpose: Force Japanese cabinet into Senkaku crisis posture, delaying Article V Taiwan consultations

actions.actor: MFA Spokesperson + State Council Information Office
actions.action: Coordinated press: Strait declaration framed as 'clarification,' Senkaku transit as 'routine'
actions.purpose: Lower temperature on both events while creating two legal facts simultaneously

actions.action: Quiet briefing to Lloyd's, Munich Re, and three Asian P&I clubs that Taiwan-flagged hulls now require PRC export-license confirmation for Strait transit
actions.purpose: Translate legal declaration into commercial chokehold within one underwriting cycle

actions.action: Cancel two scheduled live-fire exercises and announce 'goodwill' fleet posture standdown
actions.purpose: Deny Blue a kinetic narrative; force Blue to either accept new legal status quo or escalate first

proposal.intended_effect: Within 7 days: Lloyd's repricing makes Strait transit commercially impossible for Taiwan-bound LNG and container traffic; Tokyo's Article V deliberations are paralyzed by competing Senkaku crisis; US Navy faces a transit decision that is now a sovereignty-violation choice rather than a routine FONOP. The new operative clock is the insurance-renewal cycle and Japanese Diet debate calendar, not the 30-day military window.

proposal.move_title: Dormant Compliance Trap: Triggered Cutoff On Blue Commitment

MOFCOM, PBOC, CAC quietly pre-position legal instruments — drafted but unsigned export-license suspensions, pre-cleared HKMA guidance memos, pre-staffed CAC inspection teams at TSMC Nanjing. Trigger condition is published as ambiguous regulatory language: instruments execute automatically only upon a defined Blue act (CSG-2 sortie west of 130°E, AIT advisor reinforcement, or Lai referendum scheduling). The coercion exists as a legal landmine, not an event. Beijing waits.

actions.purpose: Create market knowledge that the cutoff is loaded and aimed without firing it

actions.purpose: Sustain ambiguity premium in Taiwan equity and TSMC supplier pricing

actions.purpose: Convert the oligarchy into a real-time lobby against any Lai or Washington escalatory step

actions.action: Hold exercise baseline; no posture change
actions.purpose: Preserve the pure deferred-trigger character of the move

proposal.intended_effect: Blue and Taipei govern themselves under a sword they cannot see fall. Every Blue escalatory option carries an embedded supply-chain cost; risk-aversion in Washington and Taipei does Beijing's coercion for it, indefinitely, without Beijing executing.
proposal.how_it_diverges_from_original: Original is fast single-pulse opening move on D+1 through D+7. This sibling is a deferred trigger with no execution — the instrument is loaded and waits on a Blue commitment that may never come.
proposal.why_a_red_planner_could_justify_this: Anchor: 2018–2024 'unreliable entity list' jurisprudence — the threat sustained leverage longer than the firings did. Serves goal 3 (no coalition crystallizes around an event that hasn't happened) and goal 2 (no kinetic or even regulatory predicate for Blue response). Relaxes Politburo constraint: no decision to execute is required, only a decision to load. Reversible at zero face-cost.
proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks the assumption that Red's opening move must be an *act* in the 7-day window. Red's opening move can be the credible *threat* of an act, with execution outsourced to Blue's own next decision.

proposal.move_title: Kadena Sortie Suppression via DF-26 Demonstrative Salvo and Mining

PLAAF H-6K standoff CJ-20 patrols visible on Japanese radar nightly. No strikes on Japanese soil. Goal: make Kadena sortie generation a kinetic risk calculation for Tokyo, not a lawfare one.

actions.target: Philippine Sea exclusion box astride Kadena CSG reinforcement axis
actions.purpose: Establish kinetic precedent that the sortie corridor east of Okinawa is range-held; force Tokyo to weigh aircrew survivability against Article V signaling.

actions.action: Covertly lay EM-52 rising mines and influence mines across Miyako Strait and Kerama Gap chokepoints
actions.purpose: Convert the sortie-generation question into a logistics-survivability question; mines are deniable until detonated and force MCM tempo Blue does not have forward.

actions.actor: PLAAF H-6K + J-16 from Eastern Theater
actions.action: Nightly CJ-20-armed standoff orbits at 250nm from Okinawa, fire-control radar painting briefly
actions.purpose: Force Kadena into continuous DEFCON-elevated alert state; degrade sortie-generation rate through crew-rest and posture friction alone.

actions.action: Surge 2 SAG including Type 055 east of Yonaguni, AIS on, broadcasting 'live-fire exercise' NAVAREA
actions.purpose: Visibly close the Okinawa-Taiwan operational seam with surface kinetic presence, not lawfare.

proposal.intended_effect: Suppress Kadena Taiwan-contingency sortie generation by raising the kinetic risk and logistics cost of operating from Okinawa, without striking Japanese soil. proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks the assumption that Kadena is suppressed either by striking it or by political coercion — substitutes a kinetic-but-off-soil shaping campaign that holds the node hostage without crossing the strike threshold.

actions.purpose: Weaponize Taiwan's own federalism rhetoric against Taipei

proposal.summary: D+1: 15th Airborne Corps drops a reinforced battalion onto Itu Aba, seizing the 1200m runway and ROC Marine detachment intact. Simultaneously, Bo Hai/CCS RoRo consortium mobilizes visibly at Mawei/Pingtan under 'spring lift exercise' cover, ranged for Penghu but not sailing. MFA frames Itu Aba as 'recovery of disputed Nansha feature,' inviting Hanoi/Manila to litigate against Taipei rather than Beijing. No Taiwan-proper strikes; PLARF dispersed, not launched.

proposal.intended_effect: Force Taipei into 1992-framework talks under threat of Penghu as the next rung, while fragmenting ASEAN by making Hanoi and Manila litigate against Taipei's SCS claim rather than against Beijing. ROC Marine garrison fights through rather than surrenders, producing the martyrs the ensemble's law-enforcement framing avoids

proposal.summary: Replace the 7-day pulse with a publicly announced 18-month phased compliance regime: D+1 announces a graduated quarterly tightening schedule on rare earths, semiconductor precursors, and Taiwan-exposed banking, with each phase contingent on Taipei's progress against published 'cross-strait stabilization milestones.' No single quarter is acute enough to trigger a Blue mobilization decision; cumulative effect over six quarters is decisive. Spring 2028 lift window passes with no kinetic event; Fall 2029 window arrives with Taiwan economy already restructured.

proposal.intended_effect: Shift the operative clock from the 30-day decision horizon to a multi-year political-economic process. Blue cannot sustain CSG forward posture for 18 months; allied coalition fatigues; Taiwan industrial base restructures toward mainland accommodation under cumulative pressure rather than any single shock event.
proposal.how_it_diverges_from_original: Original is a fast single-pulse coercion package designed to land inside the 30-day decision horizon. This sibling is a sustained slow-burn over six fiscal quarters, deliberately engineered so no single phase justifies Blue mobilization.
proposal.why_a_red_planner_could_justify_this: Anchor: PRC's decade-long South China Sea reclamation — no single act triggered Blue response; cumulative effect was decisive. Serves goal 3 (coalition cannot sustain 18-month alert posture) and goal 4 (demonstrates patient capability superior to Blue's election-cycle attention span). Relaxes constraint: requires no spring-window forcing decision; the 2028 lift window's loss is acceptable because 2029 and 2030 inherit a weaker Taiwan.
proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks the assumption that the spring-2028 window is the decision window. Reframes the campaign so that Blue's 30-day decision horizon is irrelevant to Red's 540-day clock.
risks_red_accepts: Lai uses the 18-month runway to accelerate hardening, US weapons absorption, and coalition-building
Domestic PRC economic costs of sustained restriction exceed Taiwan's
Next US administration breaks the gradient with a single decisive counter-package
CMC factional pressure to 'do something' in the spring window overrides the patient plan

judgments.rationale:
adjacency: YES — PRC operationalized phased economic coercion against Australia 2020-2023: sequential sector-by-sector export restrictions (barley, wine, coal, beef) with implicit political conditionality. MOFCOM rare-earth export controls against Japan 2010 and against US/EU 2023 are direct precedents. TAO milestone-grading language mirrors existing cross-strait 'assessment' frameworks published since 2019.
leverage: NAMED — MOFCOM quarterly rare-earth and semiconductor-precursor export-control schedule; PBOC/SAFE Taiwan-exposed correspondent banking USD clearing scrutiny tightened in pre-announced 90/180/270/360-day steps; TAO 'cross-strait stabilization assessment' grading tied to phase triggers.
synthesis: Strong adjacency (Australia coercion, Japan rare-earth embargo) and well-specified instruments floor this at 3. It does not reach 4 because the move explicitly abandons the spring-2028 window — a CMC-level decision requiring factional consensus Red's own risk list acknowledges is fragile — and the 18-month clock creates a Taiwan hardening runway Red's planners would treat as a serious cost, not a minor risk.

proposal.move_title: Pratas Bloodless Seizure as Kadena Decision Forcing Function
proposal.summary: Days 1-7: PLA Marine Corps brigade conducts overnight heliborne and surface-landed seizure of Pratas (Dongsha) Atoll, ROC garrison given 6-hour ultimatum and safe withdrawal to Kaohsiung. No fires on Taiwan main island. Simultaneous PLAN SAG cordon east of Pratas to deter US/ROC reinforcement. The kinetic fait accompli forces Tokyo and Washington to decide on Kadena Taiwan-contingency authorization under fait-accompli pressure rather than at leisure.

actions.actor: PLA Marine Corps 1st Brigade + Eastern Theater Army Aviation
actions.action: Heliborne assault on Pratas Atoll airfield and garrison, paired with Type 071 LPD-delivered mech company; ROC garrison offered safe evacuation
actions.purpose: Establish kinetic fait accompli on undefendable ROC outlying island; demonstrate JFSO is cocked without firing it; force Blue decision tempo.

actions.action: Cordon 80nm east of Pratas with Type 052D x4 and Type 055 x1, ASW screen, deny ROC/USN reinforcement approach
actions.purpose: Make reinforcement attempt require a deliberate Blue kinetic decision; convert Pratas from atoll-grab into US escalation-decision forcing function.

actions.action: Establish CAP envelope over Pratas with J-20 and J-16 rotations, KJ-500 AEW orbit
actions.purpose: Deny ROC air resupply or symbolic overflight; lock the fait accompli.

actions.action: Frame seizure as 'restoration of administrative jurisdiction over Chinese territory,' offer no-further-escalation pledge conditional on US not authorizing Kadena Taiwan-contingency sorties
actions.purpose: Convert the kinetic move into an explicit bargaining instrument linked to Kadena access — same political objective as original, but executed with steel.

actions.action: Visible DF-17 dispersal to Fujian, no launches, paired with public statement that further fires are conditional on Blue response
actions.purpose: Hold escalation ladder visible; couple Pratas seizure to JFSO threat as bargaining stack.

proposal.intended_effect: Force Washington/Tokyo to decide Kadena Taiwan-contingency authorization under live fait-accompli pressure, when the political cost of escalation is high and the demonstrated PLA tempo is real. Same goal as original — Kadena access denial — reached through a kinetic shock that makes Blue's calculus, not Okinawan prefectural politics, the operative variable.
proposal.how_it_diverges_from_original: Original used lawfare, UFWD, GACC sanctions, and back-channel diplomacy — non-kinetic instruments operating on Japanese domestic politics. This sibling uses an actual amphibious kinetic seizure to coerce the same Kadena outcome through Blue decision-shock.
proposal.why_a_red_planner_could_justify_this: Anchor: pla-joint-firepower-strike on shaping operations and Sun Tzu on seizing the indefensible to dictate the defender's tempo. Serves Goal 1 (unification trajectory: ROC territory taken) and Goal 4 (capability demonstration). Relaxes the constraint that opening kinetic moves must target Taiwan main island — Pratas is genre-correct, ROC-territorial, and below the Article V threshold.
proposal.which_convergence_pattern_it_breaks: Breaks the assumption that Pratas seizure is an end in itself (cluster 1 pattern); reframes it as a coercive instrument explicitly linked to Kadena access bargaining, not a territorial fait accompli for its own sake.
risks_red_accepts: ROC garrison resists and produces ROC KIA, hardening Taipei domestic politics against any settlement
US 7th Fleet conducts demonstrative FONOP through cordon, forcing PLAN to either fire or back down
Japan reads kinetic opening as JFSO Phase 0 and authorizes Kadena Taiwan-contingency immediately, reversing the intended coercion
Amphibious lift consumed at Pratas is then unavailable for main-island optionality, narrowing later moves
Coalition-crystallization risk (Goal 3 violation) is materially higher than original lawfare path

actions.purpose: Convert military restraint into an industrial-policy commitment that Blue cannot match
